page.title: Staff management
page.description: Manage team permissions and access to ticket control in active clubs.

form.title: Invite team member
form.description: Enter the email and the club. You can add an optional security word that both parties must know.
form.clubsLoadError: We couldn't load your clubs. Try again.
form.securityWordHint: If set, the invitee must enter it when activating their account, along with their password.
form.error: We couldn't generate the invitation. Try again.

invitation.successDescription: Share this link with the invited staff member. It expires in 5 minutes.
invitation.securityWordNote: Share the security word through a different channel than the link.

accept.title: Activate your access
accept.description: Complete the form to create your account. Use the security word you agreed on with your administrator, if applicable.
accept.name: First name
accept.securityWordPlaceholder: The one you agreed with your administrator
accept.success: Account created. You can now sign in.
accept.error: Couldn't create the account. Try again.
accept.invalidDescription: The link is incomplete or has been modified.
accept.expiredDescription: This link is no longer available. Ask your administrator to generate a new one.
accept.slugMismatchDescription: The URL doesn't match the invitation. Check the link you received.

deactivate.title: Deactivate access
deactivate.descriptionPrefix: Do you want to deactivate access for
deactivate.descriptionSuffix: ? They won't be able to access ticket control or bar management until you reactivate them.

table.title: Team registry
table.name: Name
table.registryCount: {count, plural, one {1 user in registry} other {# users in registry}
table.noResultsDescription: Try a different name or email address.
table.loadError: We couldn't load the staff. Try again.
table.emptyDescription: Create the first user to start assigning operational access by club.

invitationsTable.title: Sent invitations
invitationsTable.registryCount: {count, plural, one {1 invitation created} other {# invitations created}
invitationsTable.loadError: We couldn't load the invitations. Try again.
invitationsTable.emptyDescription: Generate an invitation link to add staff to a club team.
